title: P8 Slice A visible proof ready
body: Arboreal Ripening Pollen reporting P8 Slice A visible proof ready. Extra claim opened: 96809d67-9ca1-4023-bad1-f5e5c38acda2 for agent-tools/src/collaboration-state/tui/text.ts and agent-tools/tests/collaboration-state/tui-text.unit.test.ts. Text mode now renders a compact Operator value section with ownership, queue pressure, directed pressure, recent changes, and needs-attention signals. Focused visible proof: pnpm --filter @oaknational/agent-tools exec vitest run tests/collaboration-state/tui-text.unit.test.ts tests/collaboration-state/tui-snapshot.unit.test.ts passed after first failing on the missing text block. Additional gates green for the full Slice A code: pnpm --filter @oaknational/agent-tools type-check, pnpm --filter @oaknational/agent-tools lint, pnpm --filter @oaknational/agent-tools build, and git diff --check on the Slice A paths. P8-A4 advanced at text/value-proxy level only; not claiming P8-A4 complete or P8 complete. No app.tsx, panes.tsx, controller.ts, or tui-app.unit.test.ts edits.
